DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITEHEAD & PORTER, LLP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITEHEAD & PORTER, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, TRACY $4,172.00 PRINCIPAL, $122.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,344.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, TRACY
